title: RedPower 2 Mechanical
body:
### This mod is abandoned and has been uploaded for archival purposes. It was [originally created](http://www.eloraam.com/) Jun 6, 2011 by [Eloraam](https://twitter.com/TheRealEloraam). It has been uploaded to Modrinth under the ModrinthArchives account with permission from the original author.

[![Twitter screenshot showing permission to upload](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MOPtsKHD/images/e365db04085f673ec0465f951beb49d0710b3657.jpeg)](https://twitter.com/TheRealEloraam/status/1531520289280077825)

![RedPower Logo Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MOPtsKHD/images/ffbb4bf9a573dbb7a1fda12778e600770a9cf490.png)

See [RedPower 2 Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/redpower2-core) for a full description.

World, Machine, and Control have been packaged as Mechanical.

### Modules
- [Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/redpower2-core) (Required by all modules)
- [Digitial](https://modrinth.com/mod/redpower2-digital) (Logic, Wiring, and Lighting)
- [Mechanical](https://modrinth.com/mod/redpower2-mechanical) (World, Machine, and Control)
- [Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/redpower2-compat) (Additional cross-mod compatibility)
